title: Infosys completes extinguishment of 100,000,000 equity shares under buyback
detailed_summary: Infosys Limited completed the extinguishment of 100,000,000 equity shares of face value of ₹ 5 each bought back through the tender offer route. The buyback tendering period opened on Thursday, November 20, 2025, and closed on Wednesday, November 26, 2025. After the extinguishment, Infosys’s equity share capital decreased from 4,15,44,01,349 equity shares as on the buyback record date of November 14, 2025 to 4,05,46,24,409 equity shares, inclusive of 2,23,060 equity shares allotted pursuant to exercise of RSUs. The extinguishment date for the dematerialized shares was December 4, 2025.

key_facts.fact: Infosys completed extinguishment of 100,000,000 equity shares of face value of ₹ 5 each bought back through the tender offer route.
The buyback tendering period opened on Thursday, November 20, 2025, and closed on Wednesday, November 26, 2025.
Equity share capital before the extinguishment was 4,15,44,01,349 equity shares as on the Record Date of the Buyback i.e., November 14, 2025.
Equity share capital after the extinguishment was 4,05,46,24,409 equity shares, inclusive of 2,23,060 Equity Shares allotted pursuant to exercise of RSUs.
The 10,00,00,000 equity shares extinguished were in dematerialized form, and no equity shares were tendered or extinguished in physical form.
The date of extinguishment for the dematerialized equity shares was December 4, 2025.
